text: Weld robot cell 4 hydraulic pressure dropped to 1720 psi, below the 1800 psi minimum. Maintenance dispatched.
title: Weld robot cell 4 — hydraulic pressure low

text: Conveyor line 2 drive motor temperature reached 91C, exceeding the 85C alarm setpoint. Inspect bearings and lubrication.
title: Conveyor line 2 motor temperature high

text: Paint booth 1 exhaust airflow measured 18200 CFM, below the 22000 CFM threshold. Check filters and damper position.
title: Paint booth exhaust airflow below threshold

text: Stamping press 7 vibration sensor recorded 9.4 mm/s RMS, above the 7.1 mm/s anomaly limit. Possible die misalignment.
title: Stamping press #7 vibration anomaly

text: Compressor 3 oil pressure reading 28 psi, below the 35 psi normal operating range. Top up reservoir and check pump.
title: Compressor 3 oil pressure warning

text: CNC spindle 12 front bearing temperature climbed to 78C. Schedule lubrication and bearing inspection.
title: CNC spindle bearing temp high

text: Chiller unit 2 coolant flow fell to 42 GPM, below the 60 GPM minimum. Check pump and strainer for blockage.
title: Chiller unit coolant flow low

text: Air handler B filter differential pressure at 1.9 inWC, approaching the 2.0 inWC change-out limit. Replace filter bank.
title: Air handler filter differential pressure high

text: Robotic arm 12 reported servo fault code F-302 on axis 3. Arm is in safe stop pending technician reset.
title: Robotic arm 12 servo fault

text: Overhead crane bay 9 brake pad wear measured at 82 percent. Schedule brake service before next shift.
title: Overhead crane brake wear high

text: Boiler 2 flue gas temperature reached 268C, above the 240C limit. Possible scaling on heat exchanger surfaces.
title: Boiler #2 flue gas temp high

text: Forklift charger fault on bay 5, charge controller reporting ground fault. Unit taken out of service.
title: Forklift charger fault — bay 5

text: Dust collector 3 pressure drop rose to 6.8 inWC, indicating clogged cartridges. Initiate pulse-clean and inspect.
title: Dust collector pressure drop high

text: Hydraulic pump on line 3 showing cavitation, inlet pressure unstable at 4 psi. Check suction filter and oil level.
title: Hydraulic pump cavitation — line 3

text: Coolant pump 5 mechanical seal weeping, 0.4 L collected in drip tray over shift. Schedule seal replacement.
title: Coolant pump seal leak

text: Spot welder 6 electrode tip wear at 88 percent of dress limit. Perform electrode dressing or replacement.
title: Spot welder electrode wear high

text: Assembly torque tool 22 reported out of calibration on last verification, +6 percent drift. Remove from line for recalibration.
title: Assembly torque tool out of calibration

text: Plant HVAC zone B supply temperature drifted to 27C against a 21C setpoint. Verify control valve and damper actuation.
title: Plant HVAC zone B temp drift

text: Emergency stop circuit test due on trim line, last functional test exceeds 90-day interval. Schedule safety validation.
title: Emergency stop circuit test due

text: Centralized lubrication system reservoir at 14 percent on press feed line. Refill grease reservoir before low-level lockout.
title: Lubrication system low reservoir

text: Weld cell 2 weld controller reported 14 missed welds in last hour, current feedback out of tolerance. Inspect weld tips and cabling.
title: Weld cell 2 weld quality fault

text: Conveyor line 5 belt tracking sensor showing drift to the right edge. Adjust tracking rollers to prevent belt damage.
title: Conveyor line 5 belt tracking drift
